item.title: HeyPuter/puter
item.description: 🌐 The Internet OS! Free, Open-Source, and Self-Hostable.

item.title: microsoft/terminal
item.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: mak448a/Qtcord
item.description: Qtcord is a Discord client built with Qt aiming to bring a lightweight, native experience.
